title: oreocome depauperata
intro: Oreocome depauperata, also known as lesser oreocome, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. The leaves and roots of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Oreocome depauperata include its potential to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Oreocome depauperata can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water.
